title: Flutter HTTP Client Layer вЂ” Auth + Error Interceptors

steps.task: Criar hierarquia de exceГ§Гµes tipadas (ApiException sealed class)
details: Sealed class com: UnauthorizedException, ForbiddenException, ConflictException, ServerException, NetworkException, UnknownApiException

steps.task: Criar ErrorInterceptor вЂ” mapeia DioException para ApiException tipada
Criar AuthInterceptor вЂ” injeta Bearer token + refresh automГЎtico com lock
details: onError: 401 в†’ refresh via refreshDio (sem interceptors) в†’ retry original request
Completer<bool> para deduplicaГ§ГЈo: evita mГєltiplas chamadas simultГўneas ao /auth/refresh
Guard: skip refresh se path == ApiConstants.refresh (evita loop infinito)
onTokenExpired callback acionado quando refresh falha

steps.task: Refatorar DioClientFactory вЂ” adicionar createForRefresh() e injetar interceptors
details: Novo mГ©todo createForRefresh(): mesma configuraГ§ГЈo base + cert pinning, SEM interceptors
createPinned() recebe AuthInterceptor, ErrorInterceptor, OfflineInterceptor como parГўmetros
Ordem de registro (LIFO para erros): errorInterceptor в†’ authInterceptor в†’ offlineInterceptor

steps.task: Atualizar service_locator.dart вЂ” registrar interceptors e wiring completo
details: Main Dio usa createPinned() com interceptors injetados

steps.task: Atualizar main.dart вЂ” late final ProviderContainer para callback onTokenExpired
details: Usar late final container para captura segura no closure onTokenExpired
lib/core/network/network.dart: exportar exceptions e interceptors novos

steps.task: Criar testes вЂ” ErrorInterceptor e AuthInterceptor
details: Testar: mapeamento de status codes, refresh flow, deduplicaГ§ГЈo concorrente, onTokenExpired

architecture_decisions.decision: handler.next() em vez de handler.reject() no ErrorInterceptor
architecture_decisions.rationale: Preserva o envelope DioException para que todos os catches existentes nos repositories continuem funcionando. A ApiException tipada fica em DioException.error.
Evita mГєltiplas chamadas simultГўneas ao /auth/refresh quando requests concorrentes recebem 401. O primeiro request owna o refresh; os demais aguardam o Completer.

architecture_decisions.decision: refreshDio separado (sem interceptors) para refresh e retry
architecture_decisions.rationale: Usar o Dio principal para retry causaria reentrada no AuthInterceptor, criando loop infinito. O refreshDio tem a mesma cert pinning mas nenhum interceptor.

architecture_decisions.decision: onTokenExpired chama authProvider (OLD StateNotifier), nГЈo authNotifierProvider
architecture_decisions.rationale: O GoRouter atual em app_router.dart ouve apenas authProvider (StateNotifier). Chamar o novo AsyncNotifier nГЈo dispararia o redirect. Tech debt: migrar router para authNotifierProvider.
